tagline: The #1 mobile pet grooming franchise in the U.S., built on a scalable 3-territory van-based model with recurring revenue and semi-absentee operator potential across all 50 states.
description_short: Aussie Pet Mobile is the dominant national brand in mobile pet grooming, operating through a required 3-territory starting package that can scale to 9-12 vans without purchasing additional territory. The home-based recurring-revenue model is backed by Home Franchise Concepts and JM Family Enterprises ($22B revenue), making it a strong fit for corporate-exit investors seeking a proven semi-absentee opportunity in the recession-resistant pet care sector.
market_intelligence_insight: U.S. pet grooming services market valued at $2.06B in 2024, projected to grow at 6.7% CAGR through 2030; global market at $7.2B in 2025 growing toward $13.5B by 2034 at 7% CAGR, driven by pet humanization and 35% YoY surge in demand for mobile and household grooming services.
item_19_headline: Avg 2025 annual sales range from $314K (1-3 vans) to $2.1M (10+ vans) across 74 franchisees reporting full year 2025.
ongoing_support: regional operations managers,monthly webinars,annual convention,hiring software,website SEO social media support,marketing campaigns,franchisee advisory council
